title: Dropping items +
description: A mod that adds keybinds for dropping an entire stack from your main-hand or off-hand
body:
**Dropping Items +** is a clientside utility mod that adds dedicated keybindings for dropping held item stacks. It allows users to drop the entire contents of their main-hand or off-hand slots without opening the inventory or manually swapping items.

**Functionality**
- **Main-Hand Drop**: Drops the full stack currently held in the primary hand. (Default: X)
- **Off-Hand Drop**: Drops the full stack currently held in the off-hand. (Default: C)
- **Customization**: Both actions are rebindable through the standard in-game controls menu.
  
**Technical Details**
- **Compatibility**: As a clientside-only mod, it functions on multiplayer servers even if the server does not have the mod installed.
- **Requirement**: Designed to replace the multi-step process of pressing the drop key (default 'Q') multiple times or using Ctrl-Q specifically for the off-hand.
